items.title: Serena chides anti-doping system: 'I hate it'
items.summary: Serena Williams took aim at tennis' anti-doping system ahead of her Wimbledon return, calling it "unprofessional" and "unreasonable."
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: World Cup bracket overreactions: How far will USMN...
items.summary: It's the perfect time to take stock of which teams are set up for success and which might be tumbling out of the tournament earlier than expected.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'Just want to bask in this moment' - Roach toasts 300th Test wicket
items.summary: Roach became the fifth West Indies bowler to pick up 300 Test wickets
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
